markdown:
# Cape of the Mountebank

This cape smells faintly of brimstone. While wearing it, you can use it to cast [[dimension_door Door]] as a [[magic]] action. This property can't be used again until the next dawn.

When you teleport with that spell, you leave behind a cloud of smoke. The space you left is [[lightly_obscured Obscured]] by that smoke until the end of your next turn.
